mapper.sql: id, ptw_no, permit_type, work_name, work_location, start_at, end_at, supervisor_name, supervisor_dept, work_description, safety_checks_json, supervisor_sign, supervisor_signed_at, ehs_approver_name, ehs_approved_at, ops_approver_name, ops_approved_at, status, reject_reason, related_moc_no, related_wo_no, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, deleted, created_at, modified_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_psm_ptw WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_ptw WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_ptw WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM tb_psm_ptw WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_ptw WHERE ptw_no LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_psm_ptw ( ptw_no, permit_type, work_name, work_location, start_at, end_at, supervisor_name, supervisor_dept, work_description, safety_checks_json, supervisor_sign, supervisor_signed_at, ehs_approver_name, ehs_approved_at, ops_approver_name, ops_approved_at, status, reject_reason, related_moc_no, related_wo_no, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{ptwNo}, #{permitType}, #{workName}, #{workLocation}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{supervisorName}, #{supervisorDept}, #{workDescription}, #{safetyChecksJson}, #{supervisorSign}, #{supervisorSignedAt}, #{ehsApproverName}, #{ehsApprovedAt}, #{opsApproverName}, #{opsApprovedAt}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'DRAFT'), #{rejectReason}, #{relatedMocNo}, #{relatedWoNo}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{modifiedByTeam}, #{modifiedByPosition}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_psm_ptw SET permit_type = #{permitType}, work_name = #{workName}, work_location = #{workLocation}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, supervisor_name = #{supervisorName}, supervisor_dept = #{supervisorDept}, work_description = #{workDescription}, safety_checks_json = #{safetyChecksJson}, supervisor_sign = #{supervisorSign}, supervisor_signed_at = #{supervisorSignedAt}, ehs_approver_name = #{ehsApproverName}, ehs_approved_at = #{ehsApprovedAt}, ops_approver_name = #{opsApproverName}, ops_approved_at = #{opsApprovedAt}, status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, related_moc_no = #{relatedMocNo}, related_wo_no = #{relatedWoNo}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_psm_ptw SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
